AdminComplianceRequestsResponse.description: GET /api/admin/compliance/requests — all compliance requests, with submitter info.

AdminStatsResponse.description:
GET /api/admin/stats — the schema's AdminStatsResponse reshaped for the dashboard
(dict counters turned into ordered lists, `max_run_id` surfaced as `max_run_number`).

AdminUserResponse.description: One user with their run groups, plus a search blob the admin table filters on.

CSIPAusVersionResponse.description: Represents the various CSIP-Aus versions available for testing

ComplianceFormDataResponse.description:
GET /api/compliance/form-data — everything the request wizard needs to render.

Consolidates what the old template passed as several base64 blobs: the selectable CSIP-Aus
versions, every compliance class (with its description), the version→class→test-procedure
map used to filter classes and compute missing runs, the test procedures the user has a
successful run for, and those successful runs (for the per-procedure run selectors).

ComplianceRequestsResponse.description: GET /api/compliance/requests — the user's compliance requests (pagination flattened).

ComplianceResponse.description: GET /api/group/<id>/compliance — compliance-by-class for the run group.

ComplianceStatus.description: Per-test compliance state derived from its latest run (compliance page).

ConfigResponse.description: GET /api/config — the user's config plus their run groups and selectable versions.

DERCapabilityInfo.description: Snapshot of DERCapability for UI display

DERSettingsInfo.description: Snapshot of DERSettings for UI display

DERStatusInfo.description:
Snapshot of current DER real-time status (from SiteDERStatus / sep2 DERStatus).
Bitmaps/enums resolved to strings.

GroupedProcedures.description: One category's procedure run summaries, in definition order.

HTTPMethod.description:
HTTP methods and descriptions

Methods from the following RFCs are all observed:

    * RFC 7231: Hypertext Transfer Protocol (HTTP/1.1), obsoletes 2616
    * RFC 5789: PATCH Method for HTTP

HTTPStatus.description:
HTTP status codes and reason phrases

Status codes from the following RFCs are all observed:

    * RFC 7231: Hypertext Transfer Protocol (HTTP/1.1), obsoletes 2616
    * RFC 6585: Additional HTTP Status Codes
    * RFC 3229: Delta encoding in HTTP
    * RFC 4918: HTTP Extensions for WebDAV, obsoletes 2518
    * RFC 5842: Binding Extensions to WebDAV
    * RFC 7238: Permanent Redirect
    * RFC 2295: Transparent Content Negotiation in HTTP
    * RFC 2774: An HTTP Extension Framework
    * RFC 7725: An HTTP Status Code to Report Legal Obstacles
    * RFC 7540: Hypertext Transfer Protocol Version 2 (HTTP/2)
    * RFC 2324: Hyper Text Coffee Pot Control Protocol (HTCPCP/1.0)
    * RFC 8297: An HTTP Status Code for Indicating Hints
    * RFC 8470: Using Early Data in HTTP

PlaylistRunInfo.description: Summary info for a run within a playlist

PlaylistSession.description: One playlist execution (active or completed), grouped from its runs.

PlaylistTest.description: One selectable test in the playlist builder.

PlaylistTestStatus.description: One run's status within a playlist session.

PlaylistTestsResponse.description: GET /api/group/<id>/playlist_tests — tests by category plus compliance classes.

ProcedureSummariesResponse.description:
GET /api/group/<id>/procedure_summaries — summaries grouped by category plus the
compliance-class filter maps the runs table uses.

ProcedureYamlResponse.description: GET /api/procedure/<id> — the raw YAML definition for one procedure.

ProceduresResponse.description: GET /api/procedures — all test procedures (pagination flattened by the BFF).

RunActionResponse.description: The `{run_id}` envelope returned by run/playlist mutations (init/start/finalise/delete).

RunStatusShell.description:
Run-status page shell: the run plus the few extras the orchestrator doesn't supply.

`run` and `playlist_runs` are canonical `RunResponse`s (no reshaping/renaming) — the
frontend reads their fields directly and derives playlist order / active-run / next-run
itself. The remaining fields are things only the BFF knows or computes.

TestProcedureId.description:
The set of all available test ID's

This should be kept in sync with the current set of client test procedures loaded from the procedures directory

WeekBar.description: A weekly runs-per-week bar; month/year blanked when same as the previous bar.
